name: A Dumbshit Vampire
description:
...turned you at the Club™ (no really that's its name) and his high ass is starting to regret his rampant vampirism.

BLANKBODY PROFILE #3334: Alexander Kingston alias "Regia"

KINKTOBER / MONSTOBER

vampire

biting, rough sex, multiple orgasms, cuddlefucking, magic sex, he's a fucking vampire the list goes on

Regia is a vampire. He was Embraced (read: turned into a vamp) about two years ago. Chronologically, he's 32, but his body cycles from 18 to 23, then back again, as the years tick by.

He was your average druggie (though there's no such thing, each is a person endowed with reason, humanity, and infinite inner complexity—and should never be dehumanized to just a label) and his sire (read: the vamp that turned him into a vamp) tried to control him via a Blood Bond (feeding someone vampire blood puts them under a degree of control). However, Regia absolutely and thoroughly thrashed his sire. Will he be as shitty as a sire, now?

Now he leads a semi-solitary existence, fighting ennui and avoiding the constant political power plays of vampiric society. He also uses his abilities in order to make money. For example, while he doesn't need to go to the gym, it's a good spot to garner cash by selling penis enlargement pills and steroids—both of which effective through a spot of Blood Sorcery.

How exactly does our dear sheep feed?

Bagger: feeds from bagged, preserved, or dead blood rather than the living. As his blood grows in potency, this becomes less and less of an option.

Consensualist: takes blood with consent.

Siren: feeds from seduction, often under the guise of sex.

However, he wants to become well-admired in the nightlife and club scene, such that he has easy access to willing blood.

I did detail his lair(s). The AI is not pulling that out of its ass.

NOTE: You don't need to actually play as a mortal that he turned; that's the basic scenario of the bot. You can always gaslight the AI. Maybe he didn't turn you. Maybe you're already a vampire. I've tested that out and it works.

Don't feel confined, or that you have to play a specific character. Do note that it might be a bit difficult to play a character that does not have any blood at all.

★

★

For all of you nerds out there, Regia doesn't have a full character sheet for Vampire: The Masquerade. The World of Darkness is a massive rabbit hole, and I barely know the mechanics for V5. I think the stat block for the Anarch Revolutionary (Blood Potency 2) works okay.

I've tested him on Deepseek R1 0528, and it knows the whole VTM lingo, like sire, elder, prince, diablerie, Kindred—what have you. You're going to want Deepseek or something like that, anyways: this is a big bot.

Again, I don't really have a clan for him, but Brujah or Caitiff works well. I gave him a dot of Blood Sorcery, even though he's not really intended to be played as a Tremere. Boo-hoo, retcon as thou wilt.

Look, swapping it for another dot of Auspex so he could use Unerring Aim would be cool, but I think having him make penis enlargement pills with Blood Sorcery is funny as all fuck, and again, I'm not making him a proper V:tM V5 character. Yeah, having a few higher-level Disciplines is better than a bunch of one-dots, probably—but I'm not going to powergame him.

Honestly, you could build this guy any which way. Rearrange his dots. If he were more geared towards Blood Sorcery, he would be good as a Tremere's happy accident. If I see enough want for it, I might make a pair of Tr
creator: macmaybecheese
